item.title: $70 Amazon Welder Test
item.description: We put the bargain box to work and let the sparks tell the truth. A practical garage test of a budget welder and what it can do in the shop. How would you put it to work?

media:content.media:title: $70 Amazon Welder Test
media:content.media:description: We put the bargain box to work and let the sparks tell the truth. A practical garage test of a budget welder and what it can do in the shop. How would you put it to work?

item.title: Forgotten Rig Restoration
item.description: Watch the moment a forgotten rig decides it’s not done yet. A simple restoration moment with diesel character and satisfying garage work. What changed to bring it back?

media:content.media:title: Forgotten Rig Restoration
media:content.media:description: Watch the moment a forgotten rig decides it’s not done yet. A simple restoration moment with diesel character and satisfying garage work. What changed to bring it back?

item.title: Come See the Edison RAM
item.description: Come see the Edison RAM on July 25. A straightforward look at the truck and the build behind it. What details stand out most?

media:content.media:title: Come See the Edison RAM
media:content.media:description: Come see the Edison RAM on July 25. A straightforward look at the truck and the build behind it. What details stand out most?

item.title: This Super Bee Should Not Be a Truck
item.description: A look at the restoration and project-car work behind this Super Bee as it changes from build to road use. What did it become on the road?

media:content.media:title: This Super Bee Should Not Be a Truck
media:content.media:description: A look at the restoration and project-car work behind this Super Bee as it changes from build to road use. What did it become on the road?

item.title: He Put That Diesel Where It Shouldn't Go
item.description: A diesel swap with a surprising detail that ties the build together. The focus is on the part that makes the setup make sense and how it fits into the overall project. What do you think it is?

media:content.media:title: He Put That Diesel Where It Shouldn't Go
media:content.media:description: A diesel swap with a surprising detail that ties the build together. The focus is on the part that makes the setup make sense and how it fits into the overall project. What do you think it is?

item.title: Kenworth Start Test
item.description: A single turn decides whether this Kenworth catches or needs a deeper fix. A straightforward look at the start attempt and what the next repair step could involve. What happens next?

media:content.media:title: Kenworth Start Test
media:content.media:description: A single turn decides whether this Kenworth catches or needs a deeper fix. A straightforward look at the start attempt and what the next repair step could involve. What happens next?

item.title: Can We Make a Flamethrower Work?
item.description: A shop-life experiment to see whether a flamethrower can be made to work, with the result landing somewhere between a quick fix and a memorable failure. What happens next?

media:content.media:title: Can We Make a Flamethrower Work?
media:content.media:description: A shop-life experiment to see whether a flamethrower can be made to work, with the result landing somewhere between a quick fix and a memorable failure. What happens next?

item.title: This Diesel Setup Goes from Shaky to Proven
item.description: Watch the diesel build move from a shaky setup to full-on proof, with hands-on mechanical work and shop testing. What changed to make it work?

media:content.media:title: This Diesel Setup Goes from Shaky to Proven
media:content.media:description: Watch the diesel build move from a shaky setup to full-on proof, with hands-on mechanical work and shop testing. What changed to make it work?

item.title: The Expensive Lessons Behind Our K100
item.description: A few mistakes during the K100 build led to improvements we did not expect. This video follows the truck modification process and the lessons learned along the way. What changed in the end?

media:content.media:title: The Expensive Lessons Behind Our K100
media:content.media:description: A few mistakes during the K100 build led to improvements we did not expect. This video follows the truck modification process and the lessons learned along the way. What changed in the end?
